title: Principal (server-stamped caller identity)
description: Resolved and server-stamped by console-api. Browser humans use a directly validated Better Auth session; agents and services use bearer tokens backed by api_tokens. NEVER trust identity fields from an ordinary client payload. Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields. kind is bound by the credential record, never inferred from the id string. Token and session revocation are checked per request, independent of the grant zookie.

tiers.description: Permission levels (DB-defined rows, not an enum): owner, moderator, collaborator, guest, plus future tiers. Server-stamped from the bearer token record or the directly validated Better Auth identity.

lanes.description: Capability lanes for the command plane (closed enum per ops.json: viewer, editor, operator, admin, term_admin).

scopes.description: Resolved readable scope tags (zookie-fenced snapshot; revocation invalidates).

zookie.description: Consistency token for the grant snapshot this principal was resolved at.
